raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſi Laudis gabje uhe
Gilgalu / un darrija tur Saulu
par Kehniu preekſch ta KUNga
Gilgatâ / un tee uppureja tur
Pateikſchanas- Uppurus taKUN-
GA Preekſchâ. Un Sauls pree-
zajahs tur fohti ar wiſſeim J-
fraêta Wthreem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XII. Nodalla.
Samuels apleezina Deewa Preekſchâ / un preekſch
teem Lauoim / ka tas fawa Ammatâ preetizzigi
un beſtwainigi turrejees : 1. Aprahj tohs Lau-
dis / ka tee fewim weenu Zilweku par Kehniu
luhguschees : 7. Skubbina tohs us Paklanſt-
janu : 13. Apſtiprina ſcho ar Pebrkoneem
un Leetus : 16/17/18. Tee Laudis pahr to iſ-
truhzinajahs : 19. Bet tohp atkaſ no Samu-
eka eepreezinati : 20.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ad fazzija Samuels us
wiſtu Israêlu : Raugt/
es efmu juhfu Balkfnei
paklantijs eekſch wiſfa / ko juhſ
man effat fazzijſchi / un weenu
Kehniu pahr jums eezehlis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un nu rangi / teiju juhfu
Kehniſschjuhtu Preekſchâ staiga/
un es efmu wezz un firms tappis/
un raugajt/ manni Dehli irr pee
jums/ un es efmu juhfu Preek-
ſchâ staigajs no mannas Jauni-
bas/ lihds ſchodeen.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Redſi/ ſche es efmuu / Atbil-
deet prett mann preekſch to KUN-
GU un preekſch winna Swaidi-
tu/ kurra Wehrſi es nehmis? un
ekram es kahdu Ehseli nehmis?
kurram es Warras-Darbu dar-
rijs? kurru es ſpaitijs? un no kur-
ra Rohkas es Dahwanas neh-
mis / ka es ſawas Azzis tadelyt
buhtu aisdarrijs? tad es jums to
atdohſchu,
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazztja tee/ Tu ne e
muns Warras-Darbu darrijs
un ne eſſi muhs ſpaitijs / un
eſſi no jeſkurra Rohkas ne m
nehmis/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazztja wiſch u
teem : Laid tasKUNGS irr L
zineeks prett jums / un wiſch
Swaidihts laid irr ſchodeen L
zineeks / ka juhſ manna Roh
ne maſefat atraddufchi ; un
fazztja : tas buhs Leezineeks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz fazztja Samuels
teem Laudim : Tas KUNG
irr tas/ kas Mohſu un Aironu
darrijs/ un kas juhfus Tehw
no Egiptes-Semmes iſweddie
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un nu ſtahjeetees tcheita
ka es ar jums teefaju preekſch
KUNGA/pahr wiſſahm Labd
riſchanahm ta KUNGA /
wiſch jums un juhſeim Te
weem darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz kad Jehkabs Egipt
Semmê nahzis / tad peeſa
juhſu Tehwi to KUNGU/un t
KUNGS fuhttija Mohsu un
aronu / un tee waddija juhſ
Tehwis no Egiptes/un likke to
ſchaſ Weeta dſihwoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tee aismirfe to Ku
GU fawu Deewu / tapehz pa
dewe wiſch tohs eekſch Siffer
Azora Karra-Kunga Rohkas/
eekſch to Wilisteru Rohkas /
eekſch ta Moaba KehniuzaRohk
un tee karroja prett winneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad peetauze tee to Ku
GU/ un fazztja : Mehs eff
grehkojuſchi / jo mehs effam
KU
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
